actions.name: Send email
actions.description: Send an email to the contact or associated contacts.

to.name: Recipients
to.description: Email addresses, contact IDs, or lists to send to.

include_associated_contacts.name: Include associated contacts
include_associated_contacts.description: Also send the email to contacts associated with the enrolled record.

actions.name: Send in-app notification
actions.description: Send a notification to any of your team members.

recipients.name: Recipients
recipients.description: User IDs or emails to notify (comma-separated).

link_url.name: Link URL
link_url.description: Optional URL to open when the notification is clicked.

actions.name: Send internal email notification
actions.description: Send an email to any of your team members.

subject.name: Subject
subject.description: Subject line for the internal email.

body.name: Body
body.description: Message content for the internal email.

actions.name: Send internal marketing email
actions.description: Send a marketing email to any of your team members.

recipients.name: Recipients
recipients.description: Internal team members to receive the marketing email.

subject.name: Subject
subject.description: Subject line override for the template.

preheader.name: Preheader
preheader.description: Optional preheader text shown in inbox previews.

track_metrics.name: Track metrics
track_metrics.description: Enable internal tracking of opens and clicks.

actions.name: Apply association labels
actions.description: Apply labels to a contact or company association.

labels.name: Labels
labels.description: Comma-separated labels to add to the association.

actions.name: Copy company property value
actions.description: Copy a company property value from the contact to another CRM record.

source_property.name: Source property
source_property.description: Company property API name to read from the enrolled contact.

target_object_type.name: Target object type
target_object_type.description: Record type to copy the value to (contact, deal, ticket, etc.).

target_record_id.name: Target record ID
target_record_id.description: ID of the record that should receive the copied value.

target_property.name: Target property
target_property.description: Property API name on the target record.

overwrite_existing.name: Overwrite existing
overwrite_existing.description: Allow replacing an existing value on the target record.

actions.name: Create associations
actions.description: Create a new association between a contact and a company.

company_id.name: Company ID
company_id.description: Company to associate with the contact.

association_type.name: Association type
association_type.description: Type of association (primary, billing, technical, etc.).

labels.name: Labels
labels.description: Optional labels to apply to the association.

actions.name: Create note
actions.description: Create a new note attached to the enrolled object.

record_type.name: Record type
record_type.description: Object to attach the note to (contact, company, deal, etc.).

record_id.name: Record ID
record_id.description: Identifier of the record that will receive the note.

body.name: Body
body.description: Rich text content of the note.

owner.name: Owner
owner.description: User ID or email responsible for the note.

actions.name: Create record
actions.description: Create a contact, company, deal, etc. in your CRM.

object_type.name: Object type
object_type.description: Record type to create (contact, company, deal, ticket, etc.).

properties.name: Properties
properties.description: Key-value pairs for the new record (JSON or key:value lines).

owner.name: Owner
owner.description: User ID or email to assign as record owner.

pipeline_or_stage.name: Pipeline / stage
pipeline_or_stage.description: Optional pipeline, stage, or lifecycle value for the new record.

actions.name: Create task
actions.description: Create a new task in your CRM.

due_date.name: Due date
due_date.description: Due date or time for the task.

actions.name: Delete contact
actions.description: Delete the enrolled contact.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: Contact to delete (defaults to the enrolled contact).

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Reason for deletion for audit logs.

actions.name: Edit record
actions.description: Edit, copy, and clear CRM property values.

object_type.name: Object type
object_type.description: Type of record to update (contact, company, deal, etc.).

record_id.name: Record ID
record_id.description: Identifier of the record to edit.

property_name.name: Property name
property_name.description: API name of the property to modify.

operation.name: Operation
operation.description: Action to perform: set, copy_from, or clear.

value.name: Value
value.description: New value when using the set operation.

source_property.name: Source property
source_property.description: Property to copy from when using copy_from.

actions.name: Enrich record
actions.description: Enrich a company or contact record using Data Enrichment.

object_type.name: Object type
object_type.description: Record type to enrich (contact or company).

record_id.name: Record ID
record_id.description: Identifier of the record to enrich.

provider.name: Provider
provider.description: Enrichment provider or data source to use.

fields_to_enrich.name: Fields to enrich
fields_to_enrich.description: Comma-separated list of properties to update.

overwrite_existing.name: Overwrite existing
overwrite_existing.description: Allow replacing values already present on the record.

actions.name: Increase or decrease property value
actions.description: Increase or decrease the value of a number property.

object_type.name: Object type
object_type.description: Record type that contains the numeric property.

record_id.name: Record ID
record_id.description: Identifier of the record to update.

actions.name: Manage communication subscriptions
actions.description: Subscribe or unsubscribe a contact from communication messaging statuses.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: Contact whose subscription should be updated.

subscription_type.name: Subscription type
subscription_type.description: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, or other channel.

legal_basis_explanation.name: Legal basis explanation
legal_basis_explanation.description: Notes about how consent was obtained.

actions.name: Remove association labels
actions.description: Remove labels from a contact or company association.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: Contact whose association labels will be removed.

actions.name: Reset marketing lead engagement
actions.description: Reset contact engagement score of this record to 0.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: Contact whose engagement score will be reset.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Reason for resetting the engagement score.

notify_owner.name: Notify owner
notify_owner.description: Send a notification to the record owner about the reset.

actions.name: Rotate record to owner
actions.description: Assign which team member should be the owner.

record_type.name: Record type
record_type.description: Object to assign (contact, company, deal, etc.).

record_id.name: Record ID
record_id.description: Identifier of the record to assign.

owner_pool.name: Owner pool
owner_pool.description: User, team, or round-robin queue used for assignment.

fallback_owner.name: Fallback owner
fallback_owner.description: Owner to use if the rotation pool cannot assign.

actions.name: Stop tracking intent signals
actions.description: Deactivate tracking and continuous enrichment of intent signals for a company.

company_id.name: Company ID
company_id.description: Company whose intent signals should stop being tracked.

suppress_until.name: Suppress until
suppress_until.description: Date or time until tracking should remain disabled.

actions.name: Track intent signals
actions.description: Activate tracking and continuous enrichment of intent signals for a company.

topics.name: Topics
topics.description: Comma-separated list of intent topics to watch.

minimum_intensity.name: Minimum intensity
minimum_intensity.description: Minimum intent score required before acting.

refresh_interval_days.name: Refresh interval (days)
refresh_interval_days.description: How often to refresh enrichment data.

actions.name: Update association labels
actions.description: Update labels of a contact or company association.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: Contact whose association labels will be updated.

actions.name: Validate and format phone number
actions.description: Validate a phone number, and transform it to into canonical E.164 format.

record_type.name: Record type
record_type.description: Object containing the phone number (contact, company, etc.).

record_id.name: Record ID
record_id.description: Identifier of the record that holds the phone number.

phone_property.name: Phone property
phone_property.description: Property API name that stores the raw phone number.

country_hint.name: Country hint
country_hint.description: Default country code to assume when none is provided.

actions.name: Add to ads audience
actions.description: Add contact to an existing Facebook or Google audience.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: Contact to add to the audience.

sync_if_missing.name: Sync if missing
sync_if_missing.description: Create or sync the audience if it does not already exist.

actions.name: Add to static list
actions.description: Add record to an existing static list.

record_type.name: Record type
record_type.description: Type of record being added (contact, company, etc.).

record_id.name: Record ID
record_id.description: Identifier of the record to add.

actions.name: Remove from ads audience
actions.description: Remove contact from an existing Facebook or Google audience.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: Contact to remove from the audience.

keep_suppressed.name: Keep suppressed
keep_suppressed.description: Mark the contact as suppressed instead of deleting from the audience.

actions.name: Remove from static list
actions.description: Remove record from an existing static list.

record_type.name: Record type
record_type.description: Type of record being removed (contact, company, etc.).

record_id.name: Record ID
record_id.description: Identifier of the record to remove.

actions.name: Set marketing contact status
actions.description: Change if contact can be marketed to or not.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: Contact whose marketing status will change.

status.name: Status
status.description: Marketing status to apply (marketing, non-marketing, unsubscribed).

legal_basis_explanation.name: Legal basis explanation
legal_basis_explanation.description: Notes about consent capture or exemptions.

actions.name: Send slack notification
actions.description: Send a notification to a slack channel.

channel_id.name: Channel ID
channel_id.description: Slack channel ID to post to.

mention_user_ids.name: Mention user IDs
mention_user_ids.description: Comma-separated Slack user IDs to mention.

thread_ts.name: Thread timestamp
thread_ts.description: Post as a reply in this thread timestamp.

include_contact_context.name: Include contact context
include_contact_context.description: Attach summary details about the enrolled contact.

actions.name: Add contact to zoom webinar
actions.description: Add a contact to a zoom webinar meeting.

contact_email.name: Contact email
contact_email.description: Email address of the contact to register.

send_confirmation.name: Send confirmation
send_confirmation.description: Email a confirmation to the contact.

actions.name: Create google sheet row
actions.description: Create a new row in a google sheet.

sheet_name.name: Sheet name
sheet_name.description: Worksheet/tab name to append the row to.

row_values.name: Row values
row_values.description: Values for the new row (JSON array or comma-separated).

insert_at.name: Insert at
insert_at.description: Position to insert (top, bottom, or specific row number).

include_timestamp.name: Include timestamp
include_timestamp.description: Append the current timestamp as the first column.
